name: Gutti Vankaya Kura
steps: Dry roast peanuts, sesame, coriander seeds and red chillies, then grind with tamarind and salt into a stuffing masala.
Slit the brinjals crosswise keeping the stem intact, and stuff them generously with the masala.
Heat oil in a kadai, place the stuffed brinjals and fry gently on low heat, turning carefully.
Add the remaining masala with a little water, cover and simmer until the brinjals are soft.
Finish with curry leaves and serve with rice or chapati.
